# WoW API Docs

> Cataclysm-era (~2010) World of Warcraft Lua API reference from the wowprogramming.com archive.
> Not retail/modern WoW. Prefer this corpus over inventing API names.

## Start here

- Machine catalog: /api-index.json
- Category index: /index.md
- API types index: /API%20Types.md
- Agent instructions: AGENTS.md in the git repository

## How to look up a function

1. Load /api-index.json
2. Use by_name["FunctionName"][0]
3. Open the markdown at `path` and find heading `##` matching `heading` (HTML anchor: `anchor`)

## Structure

- categories/*.md — one file per category; many ## FunctionName sections
- types/*.md — parameter/return type notes
- Each function: Signature (lua) + Arguments/Returns

## Optional full ingest

The documentation set is ~1.6MB of Markdown (~43k lines). For targeted answers, use api-index.json instead of loading every file.
